title: Faster Ghaster 4x
description: Simple datapack that makes the Happy Ghast four times as fast!
body:
# Faster Ghaster
Makes The Happy Ghast Faster.
This version quadruples the speed of the Happy Ghast, but you can find a 2x speed version here: [Faster Ghaster 2x](https://modrinth.com/datapack/faster-ghaster/)
